title: Upon Gander. Epig.
content:
Since Gander did his pretty youngling wed,
    Gander, they say, doth each night piss a-bed:
    What is the cause? Why, Gander will reply,
    No goose lays good eggs that is trodden dry.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Robert Herrick, titled "Upon Gander. Epig.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
